'''chashupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonick|mnemonick]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonick|mnemonick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chashupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshipith|chæshipith]] || [[word:chæshipij|chæshipij]] || [[word:chæshipish|chæshipish]] || [[word:chæshipi|chæshipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashushuputh|chashushuputh]] || [[word:chashushupuj|chashushupuj]] || [[word:chashushupush|chashushupush]] || [[word:chashushupu|chashushupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashuputh|chashuputh]] || [[word:chashupuj|chashupuj]] || [[word:chashupush|chashupush]] || [[word:chashupu|chashupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashufputh|chashufputh]] || [[word:chashufpuj|chashufpuj]] || [[word:chashufpush|chashufpush]] || [[word:chashufpuf|chashufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashuputhu|chashuputhu]] || [[word:chashupuju|chashupuju]] || [[word:chashupushu|chashupushu]] || [[word:chashupuku|chashupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashuputh|chashuputh]] || [[word:chashupuj|chashupuj]] || [[word:chashupush|chashupush]] || [[word:chashupu|chashupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashuputhul|chashuputhul]] || [[word:chashupujul|chashupujul]] || [[word:chashupushul|chashupushul]] || [[word:chashupukul|chashupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashuputhuthu|chashuputhuthu]] || [[word:chashupujuju|chashupujuju]] || [[word:chashupushushu|chashupushushu]] || [[word:chashupuku|chashupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashuputhun|chashuputhun]] || [[word:chashupujun|chashupujun]] || [[word:chashupushun|chashupushun]] || [[word:chashupukun|chashupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashuputhuoro|chashuputhuoro]] || [[word:chashupujuoro|chashupujuoro]] || [[word:chashupushuoro|chashupushuoro]] || [[word:chashupukuoro|chashupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
